mapper.select: SELECT member_pw FROM member WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_email = #{member_email}
mapper.update: UPDATE Member SET member_name = #{name}, member_gender = #{gender}, member_phone = #{phone}, member_email = #{email}, member_birth = #{birth}, member_address = #{address}, member_like_player = #{likePlayer}, member_marketing = #{member_marketing} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Member (member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_gender, member_phone, member_email, member_birth, member_address, member_like_player, member_like_player_gb, member_marketing) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{member_pw}, #{member_name}, #{member_gender}, #{member_phone}, #{member_email}, #{member_birth}, #{member_address}, #{member_like_player}, #{member_like_player_gb}, #{member_marketing})
